={{ JSON.stringify({ received: true, orderId: $('Parse y Validar').first().json.orderId, message: 'Pago procesado correctamente' }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: 'ERROR en Resummo Payment: Payload invalido recibido. Errors: ' + JSON.stringify($json.validationErrors) + '. Raw: ' + $json.rawPayload.substring(0, 500) }) }}

parameters.content:
## Resummo Payment Webhook v5

Recibe webhooks de CulqiLink.
Soporta charge + order events.

### Flujo:
1. Webhook POST de CulqiLink
2. Parse: detecta paquete por DESCRIPTION
3. Valida payload (email + monto > 0)
4. Check idempotencia (orderId en Sheets)
5. Responde 200 INMEDIATAMENTE
6. Slack #ventas + Google Sheets (paralelo)

### Paquetes:
SELECT S/29, BASICAS S/99, CORE S/99,
ESSALUD/ENAM S/139, ALL ACCESS S/159,
ANKI S/79, ENCAPS S/79

### Config:
- [x] Slack webhook OK
- [x] Google Sheets credential OK
- [x] Sheets tab: Marzo26 (GID 778844821)
- [x] Test curl exitoso (2026-03-25)
- [ ] Webhook URL en panel Culqi
- [ ] Test con payload real de Culqi
